title: We need a My Work widget for dashboards!

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new My Work feature is so much better than My Week.

And I wish there was a My Work dashboard widget. Yes, there is currently a My Week widget. But the problem with it is you have to choose what boards to “exclude” rather than what boards to “include”. It should be the other way around!
